title: Nursery Rhyme. CXLVIII. Songs.
content:
As I was walking o'er little Moorfields,
        I saw St. Paul's a running on wheels,
                                        With a fee, fo, fum.
        Then for further frolics I'll go to France.
        While Jack shall sing and his wife shall dance,
                                        With a fee, fo fum.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXLVIII. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
